title: Auto Air Conditioner Structure Description - Sunlight Sensor

blocks.text: Auto Air Conditioner Structure Description - Sunlight Sensor

A photodiode-type light sensor installed on the upper surface of the instrument panel in the cabin, utilizing the fact that the amount of electric current changes in proportion to the amount of solar radiation (illuminance). The auto A/C control unit reads the voltage fluctuation of the solar radiation sensor, corrects the transmittance of the front windshield, and performs auto A/C control.
For vehicles equipped with auto lights, a dedicated sunlight sensor for auto light control is provided separately from the one for auto A/C control.
